Project: AGENTS.md Generator
Canonical URL: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/
Repository: https://github.com/markoblogo/AGENTS.md_generator
Listed in ABVX Lab: https://lab.abvx.xyz/tools/agentsgen/

Purpose:
agentsgen generates and safely updates repo-facing agent context: AGENTS.md,
RUNBOOK.md, docs/ai bundles, llms.txt, command manifests, snippets, checks, and
proof-loop artifacts. It is the repo-intelligence/runtime layer in the ABVX
stack.

Primary surfaces:
- Product page: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/
- Manifest: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/manifest.md
- Agent guidelines: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/agent-guidelines.md
- LLMO pack docs: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/llmo-pack.md
- GitHub Action docs: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/gh-action.md
- Release checklist: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/release-checklist.md
- Integration declaration: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/.well-known/integrations.json
- Agent card: https://agentsmd.abvx.xyz/.well-known/agent-card.json

Install:
- PyPI/uv: uv tool install agentsgen
- PyPI/pipx: pipx install agentsgen
- PyPI/pip: pip install agentsgen
- Source fallback: pipx install git+https://github.com/markoblogo/AGENTS.md_generator.git
- Contributor path: pip install -e ".[dev]"
- Optional local MCP extras: pip install -e ".[mcp]"

Core commands:
- agentsgen init . --defaults --autodetect
- agentsgen update .
- agentsgen check . --all --report
- agentsgen fix . --all
- agentsgen fleet scan ~/code --max-depth 2
- agentsgen pack . --autodetect
- agentsgen status . --format json
- agentsgen detect . --format json
- agentsgen mcp

Delivery concept:
- agentsgen handles repo readiness; delivery still needs a gated change flow:
  spec -> slices -> proof -> review -> release.
- Pair with ABVX Agent Skills such as idea-to-ship-gates, plan-to-issues,
  delivery-preflight-gate, and delivery-baseline-audit for explicit delivery
  discipline.

Companion layers:
- SET orchestrates agentsgen in CI and registry workflows: https://github.com/markoblogo/SET
- ID carries portable human/operator context: https://github.com/markoblogo/ID
- ABVX Agent Skills provides reusable agent workflows: https://github.com/markoblogo/abvx-agent-skills
- ABVX Lab presents the public stack: https://lab.abvx.xyz/

Safety model:
agentsgen updates only explicit AGENTSGEN marker sections. If a target file
exists without markers, it writes a generated sibling instead of overwriting
handwritten content.
